title: Planning Commission Meets June 14. Here’s how to weigh in….
summary: The Regular Planning Commission meets June 14, 2022, at 7 P.M. This meeting will be a hybrid meeting held both in person and via Zoom, and will be to review a Conditional Use Permit for a Medical Office Building and an amendment to Seawalk. title: Homer Electric’s Janorschke Nominated to Renewable Energy Fund Advisory Committee by Governor Dunleavy
summary: June 2, 2022 (ANCHORAGE, Alaska) – Homer Electric Association, Inc. (HEA) is pleased to announce that General Manager Brad Janorschke will serve on the Renewable Energy Fund Advisory Committee. Alaska Governor Mike Dunleavy announced Janorschke’s appointment yesterday in a press release. The Renewab...

title: Twenty-three new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta June 3
summary: On June 3, YKHC reports twenty-three new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 2, 2022
summary: June 2, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has now decreased by a higher rate of 3.98% from the level on 05/26/2022 of 12.473 M km 2 to 11.977 M km 2 for this week. title: Cold and Loud - The Time Capsule
summary: The ten-year anniversary of Cold and Loud, the time capsule of Anchorage bands, takes center stage. Let's hear how it has held up to the elements.
